results.title: ‘Dreams of Violets’ Review: What Does a Film Made Entirely with AI Look Like? Ash Koosha’s Iranian Protest Drama Is Dramatically Numbing, but It’s Still a Startling Portent of the Future
results.description: Does this mean that AI can "make a movie"? No. But it does mean that AI can give you scenes of roiling tumultuous Civil War set in the hurly-burly of Tehran at sunset, with soldiers roaming the streets and forcing citizens into vans as others scurry out of the way, and it can make you believe your eyes.

results.title: Get 4 lawn tickets for $99 at summer concerts venues in Indiana
results.description: Live Nation's "Summer of Live" offers four lawn tickets for $99 at select shows at Ruoff Music Center and Everwise Amphitheater.
